entry.title: What you mean eyelashes?
entry.summary:
Author: Arbolitodenamu

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 673Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Jason just doesn't understand how you can have big pretty eyes one week and sharp ones the next.

entry.title: Beautiful Scars
entry.summary:
Author: orphan_account

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,838Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Scars are said to be memories engraved in skin, but some people don't want these reminders. Ex-sidekick and ex-sidekick used to know each other, but now, they don't even know the way the other truly looks. -Reader has burn and SH scars, and author is a burn survivor, so this is like my way to vent with comfort character lol-

entry.title: Sleepwalking
entry.summary:
Author: T_okk_i

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,142Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 99

Summary: Nightmares about his untimely death plague Jason every time he sleeps but one night something is different. There's light in that place, there's you.You have the power to walk through dreams but something keeps you coming back to the same nightmare over and over.Back in your hometown of Gotham for the first time in years you hide from your own nightmares in those of someone else, someone who makes you feel safe.

entry.title: i'd tell you i love you, but then i'd have to kill you
entry.summary:
Author: in_violet_hues

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,643Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 83

Summary: There's a war against Gotham. Guess which side of it you're on? The Arkham Knight's. Under covert circumstances involving Deathstroke, you've been assigned a "special" role, where you operate outside the militia's hierarchy. And it's all thanks to the "unique skills" you possess. That means you have no rank, no restrictions, and an unspoken agreement that would probably turn the entire militia against you. There are just a few problems:- You answer only to the Knight.- You don't like each other (makes the first point difficult).- Also, he's the same guy you hooked up with on your first night in Gotham (makes everything difficult). You're off to a great start. OR: You unknowingly had a one-night stand with your new commander. You try really, really hard not to let it happen again. [No use of Y/N but a codename/nickname will be used]

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 149,966Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 872

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: Stray Knights and Cracked Armor
entry.summary:
Author: daizedndconfused

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,164Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 23

Summary: Gotham had been going to shit for a while. Desperate not to get caught in the cross-fire, you take a shortcut after work and end up in front of a rather wounded Arkham Knight. Staring straight into the barrel of his gun. He is beaten and bruised, and couldn't fire the gun if he tried. The Knight has been helping the Scarecrow in his latest scheme to bring Gotham to it's knees, but it seems to have gone wrong. You find him after a brutal encounter with the Bat and for some reason, some silly, stupid reason, you take him back to your apartment like a stray dog off the street. And yet, there may be more to this criminal than meets the eye. The same can certainly be said about yourself.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Heart for a Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Angelina_2206

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,239Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Jason Todd was willing to trade anything to save Gotham. His blood, life, soul. His heart. He just didn't expect to fall in love with the goddess who took them. Years later, he's a king, and you start to fade. And the only way to save her is to give back everything she poured into him, even if it kills him. Jason x Goddess Reader. No use of Y/N (Jason todd could be OOC)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Underground
entry.summary:
Author: lulustars28

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,924Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 18

Summary: There is one name in Gotham's underground fighting circuit that strikes fear in all fighters: "Red Hood".Jason Todd is Roman Sionis golden fighter, who has made him millions. To Roman, Jason is nothing more than property and profit. The only reason Jason is Roman's lapdog is to win money to put food on the table for him and his younger brother, Tim. The money is never enough, but it keeps them alive. Walking away has never been an option. Because years ago, Jason made a promise to someone who never came back. A girl he met in stolen moments between worlds—someone who made him believe, briefly, that Gotham didn’t have to be loneliness and survival. Someone who promised she wouldn’t disappear like everyone else. Then she did. No goodbye. No explanation. No way to find her again. Jason buried the memory the only way he knew how: by assuming she had chosen to forget him. Now she’s back. After four years abroad, Roman Sionis’s daughter has finally returned to Gotham. Jason sees her as a traitor due to her broken promises. She sees him as another one of her father's thugs. But how long can their past stay buried under contempt, and how long can it be before old feelings begin to rise to the surface?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The City of Black and White Turned Red
entry.summary:
Author: blessingsblessing

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,132Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: This is a story that follows a military brat turned detective in one of the most dangerous, disfunctional cities in the world. One day she is met with a new case, a drug bust gone wrong. There's more than meets the eye. A dangerous anti-hero? New high tech drugs? Drug wars? Her normal crazy was going to get a lot crazier as she finds herself right in the middle of the most dangerous, world changing case in the city. Will be following the arc of Arkham Knight and Under the Red Hood. Drugs, power, and death.

entry.title: As You Wish
entry.summary:
Author: MacbethsDagger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,849Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Five years after the death of your dear farm boy, Jason, you are to be wed to Alexander Elliot, prince of Gotham. As your wedding day approaches, you are kidnapped and become involved in a complicated plot to start a war between Gotham and Metropolis. However, one person seems to keep throwing a wrench into these plans, the infamous Red Hood. As you are unwillingly used as a political pawn, you find yourself both drawn to and deeply irritated by this mysterious yet familiar figure. (I'm bad at intros)

entry.summary:
Author: liasnotepad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,884Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 60

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,167Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

entry.title: Big Time Sensuality
entry.summary:
Author: oceanicbliss (renx)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,987Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Watching your planet and supposedly everyone you love die...not so fun. Discovering your best friend and her baby cousin are alive on a boiling hot planet with an odd yellow sun...very confusing. Being forced to become friends with this bright red and green kid with what is easily the ugliest outfit you've ever seen...super duper annoying. This planet is so weird.

entry.title: Muscle Memory
entry.summary:
Author: r_u_lost_bby_g0rl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,011Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 13

Summary: For the past three years, you’d constantly wondered why you hadn’t died too. Your parent's death hit you hard and getting kidnapped by a Gotham City goon hit harder. After Red Hood saves you, your life takes an unexpected turn full of research, cleaning up wounds, chemistry, and trying to talk with unadjusted millionaires. As the two of you fall in love, Scarecrow's plan to achieve complete control over the citizens of Gotham looms over the fate of your relationship. Uncertainty becomes a constant in your life, and, apparently, so do the ears of the nosy Wayne family.

entry.title: Unlocked
entry.summary:
Author: Pinkhair_angel

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,115Chapters: 6/35Kudos: 26

Summary: In Gotham, leaving a door unlocked should be considered a mistake. For you, it became a ritual — one you waited for with equal parts fear and longing. Every Thursday, Jason Todd finds his way back to your apartment after patrol: bruised, exhausted, and carrying more wounds than he’s willing to admit. You both know how to survive. How to brace yourselves for the pain before it comes. How to live with loss. But after spending so long preparing yourselves to lose everything… Do either of you really know what it means to stay?

entry.title: Over His Dead Body
entry.summary:
Author: Jamrockdrops

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,378Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 1,026

Summary: 15 years ago you met Jason Todd. 7 years ago he died. Finally, you've returned to Gotham ready to move on with your life and succeed in your new job at Wayne Tech. One day you get attacked and are saved by the infamous Red Hood, but he knows things about you he shouldn't and it seems like he's always watching you and always knows where you are.(No use of Y/N L/N, The Rape/non-consent tag is because it's mentioned (once) and the reader is attacked but it's stopped before anything gets too serious but I wanted to make sure no one accidentally got triggered)
